funFacts: Parasaurolophus Herd at Sunset was a duck-billed herbivore characterized by a long, curved hollow crest projecting from the back of its skull.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
